items.question: What is SecuriVA?
items.answer: SecuriVA is an AI-powered virtual assistant platform designed to automate business processes, enhance customer interactions, and provide enterprise-grade cybersecurity. It integrates with tools such as email, CRM, WhatsApp, payment APIs, and productivity suites.

items.question: What can SecuriVA do for my business?
items.answer: SecuriVA can automate administrative tasks, manage communication (email, calls, video), process workflows, detect cyber threats, secure sensitive data, and integrate seamlessly with your existing tools.

items.question: Who is SecuriVA designed for?
items.answer: Small businesses, enterprises, e-commerce platforms, fintech companies, healthcare, education, and professionals seeking automation and secure AI workflows.

items.question: Does SecuriVA support multiple languages?
items.answer: Yes. SecuriVA can operate in multilingual environments and supports AI-based translation layers.

items.question: Is SecuriVA cloud-based or on-premise?
items.answer: SecuriVA is cloud-based with optional enterprise on-premise or hybrid deployments.

items.question: How secure is SecuriVA?
items.answer: SecuriVA follows enterprise-grade security standards, including encryption, role-based access, monitoring, and compliance with GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS.

items.question: Can SecuriVA automate emails, scheduling, and CRM tasks?
items.answer: Yes. SecuriVA automates email workflows, follow-ups, appointment booking, CRM updates, ticket creation, and more.

items.question: Does SecuriVA provide voice and video interaction?
items.answer: Yes. SecuriVA includes AI-powered voice calls, voicebots, video interactions, and avatar-based communication.

items.question: What platforms does SecuriVA integrate with?
items.answer: Email (Gmail/Outlook), APIs, WhatsApp, CRMs, fintech platforms, productivity suites, e-commerce systems, webhooks, and data warehouses.

items.question: Can I customize SecuriVA for my industry?
items.answer: Yes. Workflows and AI behaviour can be adapted for e-commerce, healthcare, financial services, education, logistics, and more.

items.question: Does SecuriVA support real-time analytics?
items.answer: Yes. Dashboard insights include task performance, customer interaction metrics, threat detection logs, and workflow efficiency.

items.question: Does SecuriVA support multi-agent workflows?
items.answer: Yes. Organizations can orchestrate multiple specialized AI agents — for customer service, HR, finance, compliance, sales, and more — with shared context and coordinated task execution.

items.question: What is VPN Secure Access in SecuriVA?
items.answer: VPN Secure Access is a native, enterprise-grade encrypted connectivity layer built directly into SecuriVA. It ensures that all voice interactions, API calls, automation workflows, and data exchanges occur within a protected private network — eliminating the need for third-party VPN subscriptions.

items.question: How does AI-driven threat detection work?
items.answer: SecuriVA's cybersecurity engine actively scans all VPN and platform traffic in real time, detecting anomalous packet signatures, malicious API requests, identity fraud attempts, bot attack patterns, and data exfiltration signals — enabling proactive defense rather than reactive response.

items.question: Is MFA enforced on sensitive systems?
items.answer: Yes. SecuriVA enforces multi-factor authentication, zero-trust device verification, identity validation, and dynamic session authorization for access to protected dashboards, financial systems, and mission-critical tools.

items.question: How is SecuriVA priced?
items.answer: SecuriVA uses a SaaS model: monthly/annual subscriptions, pay-per-use automation credits, enterprise licensing, and white-label solutions.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. Subscriptions can be cancelled before the next billing cycle.

items.question: Do you offer enterprise or white-label versions?
items.answer: Yes. Tailored deployment, custom AI models, dedicated security environments, and branding options are available.

items.question: Do you provide onboarding assistance?
items.answer: Yes. SecuriVA includes guided setup, integration support, and staff training.

items.question: What support options are available?
items.answer: 24/7 AI support, ticketing, live chat, community forum, and enterprise technical support.

items.question: Are training materials available?
items.answer: Yes. Tutorials, knowledge base, API documentation, and workflow templates are included.

items.question: What API architecture does SecuriVA use?
items.answer: SecuriVA exposes RESTful APIs with OAuth 2.0 authentication and supports webhooks for real-time event delivery.

items.question: Can I integrate SecuriVA with custom systems?
items.answer: Yes. Developers can use HTTP endpoints, custom connectors, and dataset ingestion pipelines.

items.question: Does SecuriVA support multi-agent workflows?
items.answer: Yes. You can orchestrate multiple AI agents handling separate tasks and share context across workflows.

items.question: What programming languages are supported?
items.answer: Python and JavaScript SDKs are provided. Additional language bindings can be added through REST APIs.

items.question: How does SecuriVA handle authentication?
items.answer: OAuth 2.0, JWT tokens, optional SSO, multi-factor authentication, and RBAC for user-level permissions.

items.question: Is there a sandbox environment for testing?
items.answer: Yes. Developers get a secure sandbox for API testing, dummy data, and workflow simulation.

items.question: How is data stored?
items.answer: Structured data supports SQL/NoSQL. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

items.question: Can I deploy SecuriVA on-premise?
items.answer: Yes. Enterprise clients can request on-premise or hybrid environments.

items.question: Does the platform support event-driven automation?
items.answer: Yes. Trigger-based actions, webhooks, queues, and scheduled tasks are available.

items.question: Is SecuriVA GDPR compliant?
items.answer: Yes. SecuriVA adheres to GDPR principles including data minimization, purpose limitation, access rights, deletion, and SCCs for data transfers.

items.question: Does SecuriVA support HIPAA compliance?
items.answer: Yes. When handling healthcare data, SecuriVA acts as a Business Associate and provides BAAs.

items.question: Do you support PCI-DSS requirements?
items.answer: Yes. Payment data is handled by PCI-DSS certified gateways; SecuriVA never stores full card data.

items.question: How does SecuriVA protect user data?
items.answer: Through encryption, RBAC, SIEM monitoring, MFA, and zero-trust architecture.

items.question: Can customers request data deletion?
items.answer: Yes. Users may request deletion, portability, or access under GDPR and similar laws.

items.question: Where is data stored?
items.answer: Data is stored in secure cloud regions selected during onboarding. International transfers respect SCCs and local regulations.

items.question: Does SecuriVA share data with third parties?
items.answer: Only with user consent or when integrating third-party apps. No data is sold.

items.question: How are vulnerabilities handled?
items.answer: Through internal audits, penetration testing, patch management, and a responsible disclosure program.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Create an account, follow onboarding steps, and connect your preferred apps (email, CRM, WhatsApp, etc.).

items.question: How do I contact support?
items.answer: Support is available through live chat, email, and a 24/7 help desk.

items.question: Can SecuriVA make calls or send emails for me?
items.answer: Yes. It can send emails, make voice calls, host video avatars, and schedule meetings.

items.question: I connected Gmail/WhatsApp/CRM but workflows are not running. What do I do?
items.answer: Check integration permissions, API status, and workflow triggers. Our support team can assist.

items.question: Can I export my data?
items.answer: Yes. Data export tools are available under Settings → Data Management.

items.question: Can I assign multiple agents to different tasks?
items.answer: Yes. You can create specialized AI agents for customer service, HR, sales, finance, compliance, etc.

items.question: Does SecuriVA work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. The platform is web-based and optimized for mobile and tablet use.

items.question: How do I reset my password?
items.answer: Use 'Forgot Password' on the login page or contact support.

items.question: How do I update billing information?
items.answer: From the dashboard → Billing → Update Payment Method.
